calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Off Calendar

Motion To Dismissal Or In The Alternative, Stay The Action Based On Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
John Carpenter, Esq. 310-273-1230 Carpenter Zuckerman for Plaintiff.
Carla Braunstein, Esq. 925-222-3400 Wood Smith Henning and Berman LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Deonna Fianazzo, CSR #11763, 909-226-9614, deonnacsr@yahoo.com

Argued. Mr. Carpenter contests the tentative ruling and presents arguments. Ms. Braunstein responds and submits to the tentative ruling. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER, LLC.,and RASIER-CA LLC.'s Motion To Dismissal Or In The Alternative, Stay The Action.

Taken Under Submission.***

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Deonna Fianazzo, CSR #11763, 909-226-9614, deonnacsr@yahoo.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After the hearing, an order granting defendants uber technologies inc, rasier llc, and rasier ca llc's motion to dimiss or in the alternative, stay the action based on forum non conveniens is signed. (see scanned order for details)***
